data.name: Witch Please: Sex Service
data.detailed_description:
After her father’s death, the heroine returns to her hometown to claim her inheritance — an old potion shop. But instead of a peaceful business, she finds mountains of debt, a blackmailing mistress, a talking pervert cat, and a line of customers craving more than just potions. To survive, she’ll have to master alchemy, seduction, and a very special kind of customer service.

You're not just a witch — you're the sole provider of liquid lust and magical release. Brew potions by hand, experiment with ingredients harvested from bodies, fulfill filthy requests, and dive into the secrets your father left behind. Piece by piece, unlock the ultimate elixir — a potion of desire that can bend any will and break any bed.

Features:

  • Shop management — gather ingredients, upgrade your gear, expand your potion list... and your service menu.

  • Sex service gameplay — satisfy clients with body and mind, earn special fluids, and unlock erotic storylines.

  • Erotic alchemy — handcraft potions using fluids, fetishes, and improvised recipes.

  • Kinky fantasy world — horny blacksmiths, jealous nymphs, shameless hunters, and a cat with zero boundaries.

  • Potion of desire — collect the scattered parts of your father's secret formula and unlock new mechanics and scenes.

    🔮 Ready to undress for alchemy?

    💋 Add Witch Please: Sex Service to your Wishlist now — and step inside a shop where potions come with orgasms.

data.short_description: Inherit a potion shop, a pile of debt, and a line of horny clients. Brew potions from lust, serve pleasure on demand, and uncover your father’s secret elixir. In this erotic witch sim, sex is currency — and you’re the main provider.
data.supported_languages: 俄文, 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 匈牙利文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7,8,10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 / AMD FX-630
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R7 260
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
